summary: List Recycled Company Action Plan Template Items Assignees
description: Returns all Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignees for a given company

parameters.name: filters[created_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) created within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYYY-MM-...

parameters.name: filters[id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified IDs.

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_item_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template Item ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[plan_template_id]
parameters.description: Return section(s) associated with the specified Action Plan Template ID(s).

parameters.name: filters[updated_at]
parameters.description:
Return item(s) last updated within the specified ISO 8601 datetime range.
Formats:
`YYYY-MM-DD`...`YYYY-MM-DD` - Date
`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ`...`YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ` - DateTime with UTC Offset
`YYY...

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter.

schema.description: Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignees (Index)

items.description: Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee (Show)

plan_template_item_id.description: Recycled Company Plan Template Item ID the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee belongs to

created_at.description: Time the Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was created

deleted_at.description: Time the Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was deleted

is_holding.description: Boolean flag indicating whether the Action Plan Template Item Assignee is necessary to sign for a hold point

plan_template_id.description: Action Plan Template ID the Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee belongs to

role.description: Role of the Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee

updated_at.description: Time the Recycled Company Action Plan Template Item Assignee was updated

active.description: Flag indicating if the Company Action Plan Template Verification Method is intended for use
